entry.title: New IDC W15QKN19D0072 awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS EFFORT IS A SINGLE AWARD, FIRM-FIXED PRICE (FFP), INDEFINITE DELIVERY/INDEFINITE QUANTITY (ID/IQ), FIVE (5) YEAR CONTRACT FOR THE REQUIREMENT FOR THE MANUFACTURE, TEST, PACKAGING, AND DELIVERY OF M31-TYPE TRIPLE-BASE PROPELLANT FOR THE 155MM MODULAR ARTILLERY CHARGE SYSTEM (MACS) M232A2&M232A3 PROPELLING CHARGES.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15QKN19D0072 (P00001) awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MAKE UPDATES TO THE ORIGINAL EXHIBIT AND ATTACHMENTS AND CONTRACT CLAUSES AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15QKN19D0072 (P00002) awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADDITION OF 52.232-16, PROGRESS PAYMENT RATES (DEVIATION 2020-O0010) DUE TO COVID-19 CONCERNS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15QKN19D0072 (P00003) awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE CLAUSE 52.204-25 "PROHIBITION ON CONTRACTING FOR CERTAIN TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND VIDEO SURVEILLANCE SERVICES AND EQUIPMENT" INTO SECTION I OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15QKN19D0072 (P00004) awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: UPDATE THE BASE CONTRACT TO INCLUDE COST REIMBURSABLE (NO FEE) CLINS FOR THE NC AND NQ PRICE INCREASES. THESE CLINS WILL BE AWARDED UNDER THE DELIVERY ORDERS AFTER CCC CERTIFICATION.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15QKN19D0072 (P00005) awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADMINISTRATION MODIFICATION TO UPDATE GOVERNMENT POINT OF CONTACTS AND ADD CONTRACT CLAUSE THAT WAS NOT INCLUDED DUE TO A CLERICAL ERROR.

entry.title: IDC W15QKN19D0072 (P00009) awarded to CANADIAN COMMERCIAL CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: UPDATE THE COST REIMBURSABLE CLIN CEILINGS FOR NC AND NQ BASED ON ACTUALS RECEIVED. ALSO ADD THE MANDATORY ACWS LANGUAGE IAW ACC- CONTRACTING NOTE - #24-05.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
